faqs.answer: A turnkey exhibition booth is an all-inclusive service, design, fabrication, logistics, installation, and breakdown, managed by one partner. Nothing is left for your team to coordinate. One brief, one invoice, one point of accountability.
faqs.question: What is a turnkey trade show booth?

faqs.answer: Yes, exhibition stand design and build is our full-service model. We design the structure, manage fabrication, handle international logistics, and install on-site.
faqs.question: Do you also do exhibition stand design and building?

faqs.answer: Standard custom builds: 12–16 weeks from design brief to installation. Double-deck or technology-heavy structures: 16–20 weeks. For tight timelines, modular or rental options may be more appropriate.
faqs.question: What is the typical build lead time?

faqs.answer: Yes, included in our turnkey booth service. We have managed deliveries across 40+ countries.
faqs.question: Do you handle international shipping and customs?

faqs.answer: Yes, reuse planning is built into the structure from the start. Many enterprise clients run the same booth for 3–5 years with graphic updates, reducing cost per event by 30–50%.
faqs.question: Can the booth be reused?

faqs.answer: Yes, our team manages assembly, alignment, quality review, and on-site support throughout the event.
faqs.question: Do you manage on-site installation?
